Intraday post (14/Aug)

Near-term outlook, Free-education about principles, Risk window - Intraday post (13/08)

Here you can find some writing about the principles of thinking about trading, and how to handle biases. Handle analysis as a guidline not as a divinine prophecy.

INTRADAY POST Coding today positioning including Friday AM expo:

The speed profile is net negative along the chart and downside is pretty much supported towards 6400/6380 area, but based on my code, 6407.18 is already showing downside liquidity and magnet.

The centroid is at 6456.10; and the distribution is right-tail heavy above 6478.78, towards 6482.63 (even 6500 in extreme cases). But this 6482.63 (upside pivot) is a very important line especially after 1.50pmHere, locally, if spot stay above 6479, the spot can be pinned towards the upside pivot. Otherwise it goes back to the centroid, and gets pinned to 6440.

6433 is also a significant pivotal line, but very unlikely to be broken, especially during the power hour. Skew must be sold below 6443 during the AM, in order to break below but then 6420 is the pin.

6503 is acting like a max for today, and there is very-very low probability that it will be broken. Put skew should be sold more than the market indicates in order to get pinned to 6540…

OptionsDepth Heatmap

Market is basically betting on a well-supplied downside and fat body distribution at- and below the centroid, with some right-tail favoring for quick vol trades, if pivots are broken, but the key is “quick”, because volatility will be swallowed by gamma today.

I don’t trade today, just short some downside premium, nothing big…This seems like the day where we watch and stay out, and enjoy the summer. As said in the monthly post: downside is well-supplied into the OpEx…A sudden geo or monetary catalist should happen in order to push this spot towards the downside liquidity
